roles.title: React Frontend Developer
roles.summary: Build accessible React components for Spaceship Earth and the BONDING experience.

items: Ship one production-ready UI surface with a11y audit notes
Pair with design on one component spec
Own a small feature area in the hub static/Astro tree
Document patterns for other guild members

roles.accommodation: Structured written feedback; async review by default. Request alternatives for live sessions.

roles.title: 3D Developer (Three.js / R3F)
roles.summary: Immersive 3D for Observatory and Collider experiences (geodesic, particles).

items: Deliver one scene with performance budget documented
Integrate with shared design tokens and hub loading strategy

roles.accommodation: Time-boxed take-home; no live shader coding unless candidate opts in.

roles.title: Grant Writer
roles.summary: Federal and foundation grants (NIDILRR, NSF, DOE) with assistive-tech alignment.

items: One concept paper in house template
Source alignment with P31 research citations

constraints.citations: Must use repo-approved DOI / Zenodo refs where applicable

roles.accommodation: Extended deadlines available on request for written work.

roles.title: Firmware Engineer (ESP32)
roles.summary: Node One firmware: haptics, LoRa, BLE (ESP32-S3).

items: Haptic or radio milestone with hardware-in-loop notes

constraints.hardware: Board or dev kit access documented

roles.accommodation: Written test plan accepted in lieu of live demo if needed.

roles.title: Backend Engineer
roles.summary: Cloudflare Workers, D1/Durable Objects, presence and sync patterns.

items: One API with tests and wrangler dry-run
Document threat model for one endpoint

roles.accommodation: Take-home over live coding; rubric published in advance.

roles.title: UI/UX Designer
roles.summary: Accessible, low cognitive load UI for neurodivergent users.

items: One flow with motion and focus states

roles.accommodation: Written critique of an existing P31 flow instead of greenfield if requested.

roles.title: Community Manager
roles.summary: Discord, GitHub, and events; onboarding for contributors.

items: Publish one onboarding improvement with metrics

roles.title: Technical Writer
roles.summary: API, firmware, and user docs with the same bar as code.

items: One end-user path documented with screenshots or ASCII

roles.accommodation: Editorial review async; no oral-only interviews.
